# Upskilled Consulting — Free ML & AI Course Platform

> 50+ hours of free, professionally-crafted ML and AI curriculum for practitioners. From foundational math to production-grade deep learning — completely free, no prerequisites.

## Provider

Upskilled Consulting (https://upskilled.consulting) — applied ML and AI consulting firm. 200+ students trained, >95% satisfaction rate, 10+ years of experience.

## Course Catalog

### Prerequisite Courses (Foundational Mathematics)

**Linear Algebra**
URL: /prereq/linear-algebra/
Topics: vectors, matrices, linear transformations, eigenvalues, SVD, inner products, subspaces
Level: Beginner | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Matrix Algebra Foundations**
URL: /prereq/matrix-algebra/
Topics: matrix operations, systems of equations, LU decomposition, determinants, norms
Level: Beginner | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Calculus Foundations**
URL: /prereq/calculus-foundations/
Topics: limits, derivatives, chain rule, gradients, optimization, integration, multivariable calculus
Level: Beginner | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Probability & Statistics**
URL: /prereq/probability-foundations/
Topics: probability distributions, Bayes' theorem, MLE, hypothesis testing, information theory
Level: Beginner | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

### Supplement Courses (Deep Learning Building Blocks)

**Neural Network Architectures**
URL: /supplement/architectures/
Topics: MLPs, CNNs, ResNets, RNNs, Transformers, attention mechanisms
Level: Intermediate | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Activation Functions**
URL: /supplement/activation-functions/
Topics: ReLU family, sigmoid, tanh, GELU, Swish, saturating vs non-saturating
Level: Intermediate | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Loss Functions**
URL: /supplement/loss-functions/
Topics: cross-entropy, MSE, Huber, focal loss, contrastive, metric learning losses
Level: Intermediate | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Optimizers**
URL: /supplement/optimizers/
Topics: SGD, momentum, Adam, AdaGrad, RMSProp, learning rate schedulers, second-order methods
Level: Intermediate | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Regularization**
URL: /supplement/regularization/
Topics: L1/L2 penalties, dropout, data augmentation, weight decay, implicit regularization
Level: Intermediate | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Normalization in Deep Learning**
URL: /supplement/normalization/
Topics: batch norm, layer norm, group norm, instance norm, weight norm, AdaIN
Level: Intermediate | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

**Weight Initialization**
URL: /supplement/weight-initialization/
Topics: Xavier/Glorot, He, LeCun, orthogonal, variance scaling, impact on training
Level: Intermediate | Format: Readings, quizzes, labs, drill decks

### Full Courses

**3D Gaussian Splatting & Compression**
URL: /3dgs-compression/
Topics: 3DGS fundamentals, scene reconstruction, Structure from Motion, bundle adjustment, compression, spherical harmonics, opacity sorting
Level: Advanced | Modules: Foundations of 3DGS, Scene Reconstruction, Compression

**Deep Reinforcement Learning**
URL: /deep-rl/
Topics: MDP, Q-learning, policy gradients, PPO, SAC, actor-critic, visual RL, ViZDoom
Level: Advanced | Modules: RL Foundations, Value Methods, Policy Gradients, Advanced RL

**Harness Engineering for AI Agents**
URL: /harness-engineering/
Topics: agentic pipelines, producer-evaluator loops, context engineering, verification patterns, security, observability, multi-agent orchestration
Level: Advanced | Modules: The Harness Thesis, Context & Memory, Verification & Failure Modes, Production Systems, Self-Improvement

## Site Structure

- / — Course catalog (all courses by category)
- /prereq/{course-id}/ — Prerequisite course overview
- /supplement/{course-id}/ — Supplement course overview
- /{course-id}/ — Full course home
- /{course-id}/{module-id}/ — Module overview
- /{course-id}/{module-id}/reading/{id}/ — Reading page
- /{course-id}/{module-id}/lab/{id}/ — Lab exercise
- /sitemap.xml — Full sitemap (189 indexable URLs)
